ui.site_title: Soul Grimoire - The Grimoire of Souls
ui.main_subtitle: Answer four questions, and the forgotten story of your soul will be unveiled.
ui.q1_text: In what do you place your faith: the "Law" inscribed upon ancient stone, or the "Verse" whispered among nameless souls?
ui.q2_text: A wall that reaches the heavens appears before you. How do you overcome it?
ui.q2_optionA: I analyze its structure to find the single weakest point. (Analysis)
ui.q2_optionB: I strike it with pure passion, forging a path through trial and error. (Action)
ui.q3_title: Question III: The Soul's Deepest Desire
ui.q3_text: An omniscient sage asks, "In exchange for your soul's essence, what do you desire?"
ui.q3_optionA: The "Forbidden Knowledge" to comprehend the fabric of this world. (Quest)
ui.q3_optionB: An "Eternal Twilight" to spend with those you hold dear. (Harmony)
ui.q3_optionC: The "Act of Creation" to bring forth something from the void that none have ever witnessed. (Creation)
ui.q3_optionD: The "Power of Revolution" to overturn even the destiny of the stars. (Revolution)
ui.q4_title: Question IV: A Landscape of Serenity
ui.q4_text: At the end of an eternal journey, where does your soul find its rest?
ui.q4_optionA: The deep "Silent Forest" where all things began.
ui.q4_optionB: The vast "Boundary Ocean" that washes all away.
ui.q4_optionC: The crystal-clear "Celestial Sphere" under a shower of stars.
ui.q4_optionD: The endless "Earthen Plains" that pulse with the world's heartbeat.
ui.result_title: The Archetype of Your Soul - Soul Grimoire
ui.result_chapter3_title: Chapter III: The Keyword You Weave

A-B-D-E.overview: Yours is the soul of a sovereign who brings order to the battlefield of chaos. With the reins of cold reason, you master the inferno of passion that rages within, seizing the ideal known as Glory with your own hands. The path you walk will one day become the stuff of legend.
A-B-D-E.chapter1: The Lord is a natural-born leader, wedding the discipline of a Knight to the fervor of decisive action. You do not advance blindly; you paint a clear vision of victory through the mists of war and reveal the shortest path to it. To your allies, you are a beacon of hope; to your foes, an unwavering threat. Your words carry weight, and your decisions possess the power to forge the future. But never forget: the highest peak is also the loneliest. Always listen to the voices of your people, and let their warmth fuel your own flame.
A-B-D-E.chapter2: Your energy flows from the primordial force of Fire—the power to consume all things, and from their ashes, to create. This element bestows upon you limitless passion, momentum, and the revolutionary power to overturn adversity. Abhorring stagnation, you constantly seek change and stimulation. You are fated to incinerate old paradigms with your flame and bring forth a new era. When your emotions surge, this fire can become a perilous torrent that threatens to scorch your very being. Yet, it is this heat that makes your soul shine brightest, the very source of your captivating charm.
A-B-D-E.chapter3: What your soul craves is not a victory of self-satisfaction, but "Glory"—a universal luminescence recognized by the world, etched into history. It is a radiance granted only to those who have achieved monumental deeds. All your actions converge upon this single point. Though you may be covered in mud, though you may be drenched in blood, you gaze only upon the light of Glory that lies beyond. Victory, honor, becoming a legend—these are the very proof of your existence in this world.
A-B-D-E.chapter4: With the body of a lion and the wings of an eagle, the Gryphon has been known since antiquity as the "guardian of royalty," a symbol of both intellect and power. Your symbol is a higher form of this being, a Gryphon that has further wreathed its body in the very flames of passion. It embodies both the celestial intellect to soar the heavens (the eagle) and the terrestrial might to rule the earth (the lion). Its sharp talons crush injustice, and its fiery roar incinerates all obstacles. As the sovereign of both sky and earth, you are unstoppable. With your wings, aim for the heights of your ideals; with your feet, stand firm upon the ground of reality.
